name: Not So Meaty Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine beans from the bean mix and 7 cups water.
2. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
3. Cover; simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Let stand, covered, for 1 hour. (Alternatively, soak overnight in a covered pan.)
5. Drain and rinse beans.
6. To the beans, add 6 cups fresh water and seasonings from the bean mix.
7. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
8. Cover; simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
9. Add 1/2 teaspoon seasoned salt.
10. Stir in 1/4 teaspoon Kitchen Bouquet if desired.
11. Return to boiling; reduce heat.
12. Cover; simmer for an additional 30 minutes or until beans are tender.
13. Remove from heat.
14. Place about 2 cups bean mixture in a blender container.
15. Cover; blend until smooth.
16. Return blended mixture to saucepan; heat through.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
